creator: ssb22@cam.ac.uk
text: Thanks Jason.  The only thing that worries me about that patch is it means -fopenmp will not be set if CFLAGS is set, and that means we don't get the parallelisation.  So I wonder if doing this upstream is any better (tagged as v1.74) : https://github.com/ssb22/PrimerPooler/commit/798b0b2aee97b783570a49bf0f58696848e52f24
